_info: Template for src/data/home/profile.json — the single source of truth for the homepage hero, stats, and CTA.
name: Your Name
roleTitle: Primary title shown on load. Use ' / ' and ' | ' as separators; they are auto-highlighted.
bio: One-paragraph bio shown below the role title. Keep it ≤ 2-3 sentences for best readability.

cta.heading: Section heading above the CTA button.

stats._info: Each stat card shows value + label. On hover a Giphy GIF + caption pop up.
stats.label: Years Experience
stats.gifAlt: Accessible alt text for the GIF
stats.caption: Plain-text caption shown below the GIF.

stats._info: Use captionHTML instead of caption when you need coloured/styled text.
stats.label: Cloud Platforms
